author: bobylito
body:
* chore(release): changelog should be updated during release (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#530) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/8de597bd2d4cf618e8adc0bed45f7810c37575d9
 * chore(test): add test for the request builder and analytics (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#545) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/c67d89902a95a091d5579194ef8fa7f524b80b91
 * chore(tool): Publishing the website requires a manual intervention https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/45fb9b71181ce7ab4b887f1db9e1a3a4eef8e45f
 * chore(tool): replace 'gh-pages-deploy' with 'gh-pages' https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/6d071a928860afc05052c185299df2b8a71e2795
 * feat(query rules): expose userData (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#544) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/7534e548bec17f03dd35f6791b9ed6108e365790, closes https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/issues/529
 * fix(FacetValue doc): wrong attribute name in docs (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#539) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/342b1045b1414da300f881922f0bab2b2a7ec21c
 * fix(requestBuilder): set analytics:false to subsequent queries (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#543) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/6f0fe366707be5d8334829eac53bc96d4841657f, closes https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/issues/540
 * fix(setState): use .make() instead of constructor() (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#542) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/68a91776f319277b2571c412265a8aa63dcc8292
